modules.name: Tidal Core
modules.description: Your ball alternates between HEAVY (bonus damage) and SWIFT (bonus speed) on every paddle deflect — half your time in each mode.

modules.name: Hollow Ball
modules.description: A big, light ball: wide board coverage, but low per-hit damage. Coverage over precision.

modules.name: Gyro Paddle
modules.description: The deflect angle is driven by how fast your paddle is MOVING — hold still to send the ball straight, sweep to whip it sideways. Double-edged.

modules.name: Drumhead Paddle
modules.description: A PERFECT (dead-centre) deflect sends a shockwave straight up the paddle's column, damaging every block in it. Perfect-deflect only.

modules.name: Gravity Well
modules.description: The arena pulls your ball toward the densest part of the block field — great for chewing the bulk, but edge blocks become awkward to reach.

modules.name: Toll Roads
modules.description: Gold is skill-gated: only CRIT kills or kills made shortly after a PERFECT deflect pay out (and they pay double). Ordinary kills earn nothing.

modules.name: Brittle Glass Ball
modules.description: Enormous per-hit damage — but the ball SHATTERS the instant it strikes an unbreakable block. Keep it off the indestructibles (or lose it).

modules.name: Spin-Loaded
modules.description: Catch the ball off-centre and it picks up SPIN, curving in flight (the further off-centre, the more hook). The spin decays — erratic edge play.

modules.name: Pressure Cooker
modules.description: The whole block field creeps DOWN over time — blocks come to you, but if a needed block reaches the paddle you lose. Clearing blocks shoves the field back up. Clear fast or get crowded out.

modules.name: Riposte Paddle
modules.description: PARRY enemy fire: while your paddle is actively moving, an incoming hazard is deflected back up as a damaging bolt instead of hurting you. A stationary paddle still takes the hit.

modules.name: Twin Soul Core
modules.description: Serve TWO tethered balls (each hits softer). The energy tether strung between them slices any block it crosses — but if you lose one twin, the tether dies.

modules.name: Fission Core
modules.description: Every few kills the ball SPLITS into smaller fragments — scattered and fragile. Catch them and they re-FUSE into one bigger ball. Risk while split, payoff when you regroup.
